ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-14-2023 Continued To Apr-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anne Slater, via ZOOM, for Guilaine Hedquist, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Ms. Slater that there are no known objections to this petition and that the issue of any known predeceased children has been resolved. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Oct-18-2021 is admitted to probate. Guilaine Hedquist is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority/limited authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-31-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Neves. Not reported.
